query:
UPDATE vendas SET afericao = 1 WHERE codigoAcs IN (
  SELECT CONCAT(TRIM(a.cod_empresa), '-', TRIM(a.codigo)) 
  FROM (SELECT 'placeholder' as cod_empresa, 'placeholder' as codigo) a WHERE 1=0
)
